solution.answer: $H_0(S^1 \vee S^1) \cong \mathbb{Z},\quad H_1(S^1 \vee S^1) \cong \mathbb{Z}^2,\quad H_n = 0 \text{ for } n \geq 2.$
steps: CW structure: one 0-cell $v$ (the wedge point), two 1-cells $a$ and $b$ (both loops at $v$). No higher cells.
$H_1 = \ker(d_1)/0 = \mathbb{Z}^2$, generated by the two independent loops $[a]$ and $[b]$.
More generally, for a finite connected graph with $V$ vertices and $E$ edges: $H_1 \cong \mathbb{Z}^{E-V+1}$.
